name: Offset
summary: The Offset class defines the offset value of start points and end points. The offset is the distance from the current work plane in the three global directions.

constructors.name: Offset
constructors.summary: Instantiates an offset with zero distance.

properties.name: Dx
properties.summary: The current object's Dx offset. This value is defined using the object's coordinate system.

properties.name: Dy
properties.summary: The current object's Dy offset. This value is defined using the current work plane.

properties.name: Dz
properties.summary: The current object's Dz offset. This value is defined using the current work plane.
